title: Design polish and accessibility
description: Dedicated audit and polish pass: WCAG 2.2 AA audit, mobile optimization, dark mode verification, visual coherence review. Accessibility should be considered throughout development; this is the formal verification. Deliverable: accessibility audit report with all issues resolved, tested on desktop and mobile in both themes.

title: Admin registration for all catalog models
description: Register all models in Django admin with list displays, search fields, and filters. Admin is the primary maintenance interface. Ensure admin can create user accounts easily.
close_reason: All models registered in Django admin with list displays, filters, search, inlines for identifiers, images, and series volumes.

title: ExternalIdentifier model
description: Fields: record (FK), identifier_type (choice: ISBN, LCCN, NLI control number, VIAF ID, OCLC, etc.), value (string). Unique constraint on (record, identifier_type, value).
close_reason: ExternalIdentifier model with identifier_type choices, value, unique constraint on (record, type, value).

title: Django project and app initialization
description: Initialize Django project (otzar) and three apps (catalog, sources, ingest). Configure settings.py: SQLite with WAL mode and busy timeout, static/media paths, installed apps, middleware. Set up .env loading with python-dotenv. Configure ALLOWED_HOSTS, CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS. Document superuser creation. Set up Justfile with commands: dev, test, lint, migrate, shell.
close_reason: Django project initialized with three apps (catalog, sources, ingest), settings configured with .env loading, SQLite WAL mode, media/static paths. Justfile, urls.py with auth URLs. Initial migrations applied.

title: TitlePageImage model
description: Fields: record (FK, nullable for staging), image (FileField — staging at media/staging/YYYY/MM/DD/{uuid}.ext, moved to media/title-pages/YYYY/MM/DD/{record-id}.ext on confirmation), uploaded_at, staged (boolean).
close_reason: TitlePageImage model with nullable record FK, ImageField, staged boolean.

title: Review gate: deployment
description: Verify: app accessible at production URL over HTTPS, health check returns 200, nightly backup runs and uploads to S3, restore tested on fresh server, safe update tested (deploy with migration preserving data), pre-deploy backup automatic, process restarts after crash/reboot.

title: SRU client
description: Port from experimental sru.py. Accepts catalog identifier (NLI, LC) and query params. Builds CQL query strings. HTTP GET via httpx. Handles NLI phrase-quoting, LC endpoint/version specifics. Configurable polite delay (default 3-5s). Graceful error handling: timeouts, HTTP errors, malformed responses return clear error results. Test with known queries.
close_reason: SRU client with CQL query building, NLI phrase quoting, configurable delay, graceful error handling. Pre-configured NLI, LC, VIAF clients.

title: User-facing help
description: Audience: catalogers and community members. Brief in-app help or help page: how to search, how to browse (author, title, subject, etc.), cataloger workflows (barcode scan, title page photo, manual entry, review queue, series volumes). Keep concise — interface should be mostly self-explanatory.

title: Review gate: ingest workflows
description: Verify: manual entry creates complete Record, barcode scan finds known ISBN, OCR extracts correct metadata (Hebrew and English), cascade returns candidates, candidate UI shows summary with expandable MARC, authority matching identifies existing authors, series workflow creates/extends series with gaps, review queue works cross-device, QR handoff works, all tests pass, tested on actual phone (iOS Safari and/or Android Chrome).

title: System administration documentation
description: Audience: sysadmins. Deployment guide (production setup from scratch). Configuration reference (every .env variable). Routine operations (updates, user accounts, site-wide password). Backup and restore (full procedure, tested). Monitoring and troubleshooting (health check, logs, common issues). Upgrade guide (apply upgrades, verify, rollback).

title: API cost monitoring
description: Admin interface shows basic Claude Vision usage stats: total scans, recent API calls. Consider configurable daily/monthly scan limit as a safety net. Sonnet costs ~$0.02 per image.
close_reason: APIUsageLog model for tracking API calls with token counts. ScanResult model for review queue. Both registered in admin with list displays and filters.

title: ISBN lookup
description: Simple search path: given an ISBN, query NLI (alma.isbn) and LC (bath.isbn) directly. No cascade needed — direct identifier match.
close_reason: ISBN lookup queries both NLI (alma.isbn) and LC (bath.isbn), handles partial failures gracefully.

title: Typography system
description: Configure Tailwind type scale accounting for RTL sizing: Hebrew text 1-2 sizes larger than Latin at same visual weight. Choose fonts covering Latin, Hebrew, Aramaic (system font stack baseline, consider web font with strong Hebrew support). Test readability on phone screens.
close_reason: Font stack with Noto Sans Hebrew. RTL text gets 1.1em size bump via .text-rtl class. Line height 1.6 for RTL readability.

title: Author model
description: Fields: name (original script), name_romanized, viaf_id (nullable), variant_names (JSON field for authority data). M2M relationship to Record.
close_reason: Author model with name, romanized name, VIAF ID, variant names JSON field, M2M to Record.

title: Final review gate
description: Comprehensive end-to-end verification before production use: all tests pass, all phase review gates completed, end-to-end ingest tests (barcode, OCR, QR handoff), production deployment verified, restore tested, documentation complete, WCAG compliance, mobile testing, stakeholder walkthrough. Also: review the full codebase for simplicity and clarity — identify redundant or overly complex code that could be simplified for easier maintenance.

title: Add project dependencies
description: Add to pyproject.toml: anthropic, httpx, mrrc (pin to new version once marcjson update lands), python-dotenv, pillow, qrcode, pytest, pytest-django. Dev deps: ruff, django-debug-toolbar.
close_reason: All dependencies added: anthropic, httpx, mrrc, pillow, qrcode, python-dotenv. Dev deps: ruff, pytest, pytest-django, django-debug-toolbar.

title: Production platform setup
description: Set up hosting (platform TBD — VPS or PaaS). Requirements: SSL/HTTPS with automated certs, persistent storage for SQLite DB and media, production Django settings (DEBUG=False, SECRET_KEY, ALLOWED_HOSTS, static file serving), WSGI/ASGI server (gunicorn/uvicorn), process management (restart on crash/reboot).

title: WCAG 2.2 AA audit
description: Contrast ratios (both themes), keyboard navigation, focus indicators, form labels/errors/ARIA, screen reader testing (VoiceOver macOS/iOS minimum), image alt text for title page scans.

title: Deployment guide
description: Write deployment guide in /docs covering: server/platform setup from scratch, application deployment and update procedure (the safe update process), backup configuration and restore procedure, SSL management (if manual), common maintenance tasks. This is the operational guide written against the real deployed system.

title: FTS5 full-text search setup
description: Create FTS5 virtual table via migration indexing Record fields (title, title_romanized, notes). Index Author names and Subject headings — requires denormalized content copied into FTS table on save (via signals or explicit updates). Provide search manager/utility that queries FTS5 and returns ranked Record querysets.
close_reason: FTS5 virtual table with record_id (UNINDEXED), title, title_romanized, subtitle, authors, subjects, notes. Search returns ranked results. Denormalized author/subject content on index. reindex_all management utility.

title: Browse views
description: Seven paginated browse views: author (/browse/authors/ — work count, variant names), title (/browse/titles/ — ICU collation or group by script for mixed-script sort), subject (/browse/subjects/ — record counts), publisher (/browse/publishers/), date (/browse/dates/ — by decade/century), location (/browse/locations/), series (/browse/series/ — volumes with held/gap status). Cross-links between related views.
close_reason: Seven browse views (author, title, subject, publisher, date, location, series) with pagination, record counts, held/gap indicators. Browse index page. 12 tests.

title: MARC record parser
description: Port from experimental code. Uses mrrc to parse MARC XML from SRU response envelopes. Extract key fields: 245, 100, 260/264, 008, 020, 880. Handle LC 880-field alternate script linkage. Handle NLI direct Hebrew in primary fields. Return structured dict. Test with saved XML from experiment cache.
close_reason: MARC parser with extract_marc_records, parse_record (245, 100, 260/264, 008, 020, 880 linkage, series 490/830), has_hebrew, get_field_value, record_to_marcjson. Handles both LC 880 pattern and NLI direct Hebrew. 39 tests.

title: Test data fixtures
description: Management command or fixture set to populate the database with representative test records: Hebrew, English, mixed-script, series with gaps, multiple authors. Use real MARC data from experiment cache. Useful for development, testing, and demos.
close_reason: Management command load_test_data creates 6 records (Hebrew, English, mixed-script), 4 authors with VIAF IDs, 1 series with 2 held volumes and 12 gaps, 3 locations, subjects, publishers, external identifiers. FTS indexed.

title: Location model
description: Fields: label (freeform text, e.g. 'Floor 1, Room B, Shelf 4a'). M2M relationship to Record.
close_reason: Location model with freeform label, M2M to Record.

title: Cross-device QR handoff
description: Ingest page shows QR code linking to phone scanning interface. QR link includes short-lived auth token (Django signing framework or one-time token) — no phone login needed. Phone UI is minimal: scan or photograph, confirmation it landed in queue, move to next item. Review happens on any device via queue view.

title: Manual entry form
description: Simplest ingest path and also the editing interface. Django form for: title, subtitle, author, publisher, place, date, language, location (freeform), notes. On save creates Record and related models. Mobile-friendly layout: single column, large touch targets.
close_reason: Manual entry form with RecordForm, create/edit views, related model attachment (author, publisher, location), FTS indexing on save, mobile-friendly template. 8 tests.

title: Review gate: design polish
description: Verify: WCAG 2.2 AA automated audit passes (zero critical/serious), keyboard nav tested all pages, screen reader tested, contrast passes both modes, mobile tested on real phones, touch targets 44x44px, visual coherence consistent.

title: ISBN/barcode scanning
description: Frontend: camera viewfinder with JS barcode library (QuaggaJS or Barcode Detection API), send ISBN to server via HTMX. Backend: ISBN lookup against NLI/LC, return candidate record list with key fields, expand-detail option showing full metadata and source MARC, select match to pre-fill entry form, confirm creates Record with source MARC.

title: Review gate: documentation
description: Verify: developer docs cover setup through contribution, sysadmin docs cover deployment through recovery, user help covers all workflows, all docs accurate against the real deployed system, built with Material for MkDocs.

title: Backup system
description: Nightly backups to S3: SQLite database dump, media files, application config. Backup retention policy (e.g. 30 daily, 12 monthly). Document and test the restore procedure: given fresh server and S3 bucket, restore the full application.

title: Catalog views
description: Public-facing catalog: record detail page, seven browse views (author, title, subject, publisher, date, location, series), FTS5 search with facets, home page, RTL/bidi rendering, typography. Includes test data fixtures. Deliverable: fully browsable, searchable catalog with correct bidi rendering and readable typography.

title: Authentication and admin setup
description: Configure Django auth with login/logout views. Set up admin site. Implement site-wide password middleware: optional password gate controlled by SITE_PASSWORD setting. When enabled, all public pages require the password. Logged-in cataloger accounts bypass it.
close_reason: Django auth URLs configured, admin site set up, site-wide password middleware implemented with CSRF support, exempt paths for admin/accounts/health.

title: Series workflow
description: During or after ingest: detect series data from MARC 490/830 fields, present to cataloger. Link to existing Series or create new. 'Add more volumes' flow: cataloger indicates volumes held ('all 13' or '1, 3, 5, 7'), app uses series metadata to pre-fill search queries for additional volumes. SeriesVolume records for held volumes; gaps with held=False.

title: Review gate: catalog views
description: Verify: all browse views render with real data, record detail shows all fields/related items/image/MARC, browse counts and pagination correct, series shows held/gaps, search returns results in Hebrew/English/romanized, RTL rendering correct, typography readable, all view tests pass.

title: Review gate: catalog models
description: Verify: all migrations apply cleanly on fresh database, all model tests pass (creation, validation, relationships, ID generation), FTS5 search returns expected results for multilingual test records, admin is usable for all models, record IDs are unique and correctly prefixed.
close_reason: All migrations apply cleanly, 32 model/search tests pass, FTS5 works for multilingual records, admin usable for all models, record IDs unique and correctly prefixed. Lint and format clean.

title: RTL and bidi rendering
description: Cross-cutting across all views: dir=auto on mixed-content elements, dir=rtl on known Hebrew/Aramaic blocks. Tailwind RTL utilities (rtl: variant). Test with real Hebrew content — verify alignment, punctuation placement, mixed-script lines.
close_reason: Bidi template tags (bidi_text, bidi_auto) with Hebrew detection. CSS rules for RTL text-align and unicode-bidi. Skip-to-content link and aria-label on nav. 11 tests.

title: Subject model
description: Fields: heading, heading_romanized, source (LC/NLI/local). M2M relationship to Record.
close_reason: Subject model with heading, romanized heading, source, M2M to Record.

title: Deployment and operations
description: Production deployment: platform setup (hosting TBD — VPS or PaaS), SSL, persistent storage, backups to S3, safe update procedure, monitoring, deployment documentation. Deliverable: app running publicly with SSL, nightly backups, tested restore, documented safe update process.

title: Create .env.example configuration template
description: Document all config variables with sensible defaults: SECRET_KEY, DEBUG, ALLOWED_HOSTS, CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CLAUDE_MODEL, AWS creds/bucket/region for S3 backups, SRU endpoint URLs (NLI, LC, VIAF with public defaults), SRU_REQUEST_DELAY, RECORD_ID_PREFIX (default otzar-), SITE_PASSWORD (optional). Only SECRET_KEY and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required to start locally.
close_reason: .env.example created with all config variables and sensible defaults.

title: Review gate: external source clients
description: Verify: all client tests pass with saved fixtures (no network needed), live integration tests pass (manual), ISBN lookup returns correct records, search cascade produces results for known Hebrew titles, VIAF enrichment extracts authority IDs and variant names, caching works (second query hits cache), rate limiting delays respected.
close_reason: All 170 tests pass, lint clean. SRU client, MARC parser, response caching, VIAF client, search cascade, ISBN lookup all working with tests.

title: Publisher model
description: Fields: name, name_romanized, place. M2M or FK relationship to Record.
close_reason: Publisher model with name, romanized name, place, M2M to Record.

title: Home page
description: Main entry point for community members. Prominent search bar. Quick links to browse views. Summary stats: total records, authors, recent additions. Keep it simple.
close_reason: Home page with search bar, browse category links, summary stats, recent additions. Uses home view with dynamic data.

title: Ingest workflows
description: Data input for catalogers: manual entry form, ISBN/barcode scanning, title page OCR via Claude Vision, authority matching on ingest, series workflow, review queue, cross-device QR handoff, ingest session state. All usable from phone browsers. Deliverable: cataloger can add records via any method with series, authority matching, review queue, and cross-device handoff working.

title: Safe update procedure
description: Deploy process: pre-deploy backup (automatic), pull code, install/update deps, run migrations, collect static, restart server. Non-destructive migrations only — review each migration for data safety. Media files never touched by deploys. Documented rollback path via pre-deploy backup.

title: Review queue
description: ScanResult model: uploaded image or ISBN, OCR output, candidate MARC records, status (pending/confirmed/discarded), scanned-by user, timestamp. Queue view with expandable candidate details and source MARC. Confirm creates Record from selected candidate. Discard marks for cleanup. Staging cleanup management command with configurable retention (e.g. 30 days).

title: Frontend tooling setup
description: Install and configure Tailwind CSS (django-tailwind or standalone CLI). Set up HTMX and Alpine.js. Create base.html template with: HTML lang attribute, dir handling for bidi, Tailwind/HTMX/Alpine script tags, navigation skeleton (home, browse, search, ingest), dark mode (prefers-color-scheme default, Tailwind dark: utilities, user toggle), responsive viewport meta.
close_reason: Tailwind CSS via django-tailwind-cli, HTMX 2.0.4 and Alpine.js 3.14.8 via CDN, base template with nav, dark mode toggle (system default + localStorage), responsive viewport. Home page placeholder.

title: Dark mode verification
description: All pages in both light and dark modes. Contrast ratios pass in both. No hard-coded colors that break in dark mode. Title page images: subtle border/background against dark backgrounds.

title: VIAF client
description: Port from experimental experiment_viaf.py. Search VIAF by author name with cascade: exact Hebrew → romanized → broad keyword → multi-word AND. Parse cluster responses: extract VIAF ID, J9U ID, LCCN, authorized headings, variant name forms. Cluster matching logic: normalize and compare headings/variants. Return structured enrichment data. Test with known authors.
close_reason: VIAF client with search cascade, cluster parsing, cluster matching with normalization, viaf_enrich for best-match authority lookup.

title: Project scaffolding
description: Set up the Django project with all infrastructure: project config, dependencies, .env template, frontend tooling (Tailwind/HTMX/Alpine), auth and admin, testing infrastructure. Deliverable: styled placeholder page with navigation, auth, dark mode, and passing tests.
close_reason: All scaffolding tasks and review gate complete.

title: CI check: full test suite, lint, and format
description: Run uv run pytest, uv run ruff check ., uv run ruff format --check . as a single verification pass. Can be run locally or in CI. Ensure all pass with zero errors before any release.

title: Catalog data models
description: Core schema: Record, Author, Subject, Publisher, Series/SeriesVolume, Location, ExternalIdentifier, TitlePageImage models. Record ID generation (base62 with configurable prefix). Admin registration. FTS5 full-text search setup. Deliverable: migrations run, models visible in admin, sample records can be created and searched.
close_reason: All catalog models, admin, FTS5, and review gate complete.

title: Ingest session state
description: Preserve work-in-progress across the three input methods. If barcode fails and cataloger switches to OCR, data carries over. Options: Django session storage or HTMX client-side state accumulation. Decide during implementation.

title: Series and SeriesVolume models
description: Series: title, title_romanized, total_volumes (nullable), publisher (FK, nullable). SeriesVolume (through model): series FK, record FK, volume_number (string for non-numeric like '3a', 'supplement'), held (boolean, default True for gap representation).
close_reason: Series model with title, total_volumes, publisher FK. SeriesVolume through model with string volume_number, held boolean for gap representation.

title: Authority matching on ingest
description: Before saving a new Record, check if author name matches or nearly matches existing Author using VIAF cluster data (variant names). Prompt cataloger: 'This looks like the same author as N other items. Confirm?' Option to link to existing Author or create new. Same pattern for Publisher (exact match).

title: Testing infrastructure
description: Configure pytest with pytest-django (conftest.py, pyproject.toml config). Set up test database and fixtures directory. Verify uv run pytest works with a trivial passing test.
close_reason: pytest configured with pytest-django, conftest.py, smoke tests for all three apps passing.

title: Record identifier generation
description: Implement base62-encoded ID with configurable prefix. Site settings model (singleton) or Django settings for prefix string (default 'otzar-'). Utility function that generates the next ID from a sequence.
close_reason: Base62 encoding and configurable prefix record ID generation implemented.

title: Visual coherence review
description: Consistent spacing, alignment, typographic hierarchy across all pages. Dense pages (record detail, browse lists) reviewed for scannability. Mixed-script pages reviewed for visual balance.

title: Title page OCR via Claude Vision
description: Frontend: camera capture input, client-side resize to ~1500px via JS canvas, HTMX upload with progress. Backend: store in staging, send to Claude Vision API with OCR prompt (structured JSON output, no nikkud, ALA-LC romanization, gematria date conversion). Display extracted metadata for review/correction. On confirm run search cascade, show candidates, select or proceed with OCR data alone. Attach title page image to Record.

title: Response caching for external queries
description: Port caching strategy from experiments. Cache key: hash of base URL + query params. Store in Django-managed location (DB table or file cache). Cache lookup before network requests. Time-based expiry (configurable, e.g. 30 days) or manual invalidation.
close_reason: Response cache using Django file-based cache with MD5 key generation, TTL support, invalidation.

title: Record detail page
description: Display all Record fields and related models. Title page image. Related items: same author, same series (with gap indicators), same location. Commentary chain links where subject data supports it. Expandable source MARC in tagged display format. External identifier links (LCCN, NLI, VIAF). Bidi rendering with dir=rtl/auto. URL: /catalog/{record_id}/{slug}/.
close_reason: Record detail page with bidi rendering, authors/subjects/publishers/locations, series volumes with gap indicators, expandable MARC display, external identifier links, related works. 6 tests.

title: Search cascade engine
description: General cascade mechanism: takes catalog identifier and metadata dict, runs progressively broader queries (defined per catalog), stops at first query returning results, returns parsed MARC records. NLI and LC cascade definitions are configuration (data structures), not code. NLI: 7-query cascade. LC: 4-query cascade.
close_reason: Search cascade engine with NLI (7-step) and LC (4-step) cascades as data structures. Skips steps with missing fields, stops at first hit. 20 tests.

title: Record model
description: Central catalog model. Fields: record_id (base62 with configurable prefix, CharField), slug (Unicode, allow_unicode=True for Hebrew/Aramaic), title, title_romanized, subtitle, date_of_publication (integer year, nullable), date_of_publication_display (freeform string for approximate dates), place_of_publication, language, source_marc (JSON/marcjson, nullable), source_catalog (NLI/LC/null), notes, created_by (FK User), created_at, updated_at.
close_reason: Record model with all fields, auto ID generation, Unicode slug, date display fallback.

title: Health check and monitoring
description: /health/ endpoint returning 200 if app and DB accessible. Log access and rotation. Optional uptime monitoring via external ping service.

title: Catalog search
description: Search bar in site navigation (every page). FTS5 full-text search across all indexed fields. Results page with key fields highlighted. Faceted filtering by author, subject, date range, location, language (progressive enhancement). Cross-language: Hebrew and romanized queries find the same record.
close_reason: FTS5 search view with pagination, result highlighting, cross-language search. 7 tests.

title: Developer documentation
description: Audience: contributors. Getting started (clone, deps, .env, migrate, superuser, dev server). Project structure (what each app does). Architecture overview (sources → ingest → catalog data flow). Data model reference. SRU/VIAF integration (cascade, caching, rate limiting). OCR integration (Claude Vision, prompt, caching). Testing (run tests, fixtures, live integration tests). Coding conventions.

title: Mobile optimization
description: Test all flows on phone-sized screens (especially ingest). Touch targets min 44x44px. Camera interactions tested on iOS Safari and Android Chrome. Image upload resize verified on mobile browsers.

title: Review gate: scaffolding
description: Verify: all tests pass, linting passes, dev server runs with styled placeholder page, .env.example is complete, dark mode toggle works, auth login/logout works, site-wide password gate works and is bypassable for logged-in users.
close_reason: All checks pass: tests green, lint clean, format clean, Django check clean. Dev server runs, placeholder home page loads, dark mode works, auth works, site-wide password middleware works.

title: Documentation
description: Complete documentation set: developer docs (getting started, architecture, data model, integrations, testing, conventions), system admin docs (deployment, config reference, operations, backup/restore, monitoring, upgrades), user-facing help (search, browse, cataloger workflows). Built with Material for MkDocs.

title: External source clients
description: SRU client (NLI, LC), MARC record parser, response caching, VIAF client, search cascade engine, ISBN lookup. All model-independent — returns parsed data. Deliverable: management command or test script that queries external catalogs and returns parsed results with VIAF enrichment.
close_reason: External source clients epic complete. All components built and tested.
